card_description: The Protestant is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick identifies his experience with Hegel's third stage of religion (Absolute Spirit), arguing that evolution has moved from the biological to the historical."

linked_segments.summary: Dick identifies his experience with Hegel's third stage of religion (Absolute Spirit), arguing that evolution has moved from the biological to the historical. He predicts the emergence of a "new type
